source_pr.title: support constant propagation
source_pr.body:
@shenli @hanfei1991 @zimulala @coocood @tiancaiamao 
PTAL
A transformation takes place for expressions like this:

> WHERE column1 = column2 AND column2 = 'x'

the transformed condition becomes:

> WHERE column1 = 'x' AND column2 = 'x'

With constant propagation, we can improve predicate push down
like:

> SELECT \* FROM t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a where t1.a = 1;

after propagate constant, we get 

> SELECT \* FROM t1 join t2 where t2.a = 1 and t1.a = 1;

and we can push down all the conditions.

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: executor/builder.go, expression/expression.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/plan_test.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go
